description: Implement the Technical Manual tab with comprehensive documentation and the PDF Print Report tab with full report generation capability.
steps: Wire up the Technical Manual tab content in index.html (or dynamically via app.js): Write comprehensive documentation covering: (a) Overview of the module and its purpose. (b) BPHS methodology explanation - how house significations are assessed, yoga identification rules. (c) KP methodology explanation - sub-lord theory, significator determination, ruling planet concept. (d) Vimshottari Dasha system explanation - how periods are calculated, marriage timing logic. (e) Transit analysis methodology - double transit theory, Saturn/Jupiter/Rahu-Ketu transit effects. (f) Health compatibility methodology - which planetary combinations indicate which health concerns. (g) Ashtakoota matching system explanation - each of the 8 kootas with scoring rules. (h) Dashakoota matching system explanation - each of the 10 kootas with rules. (i) Interpretation guidelines - how to read the results, threshold scores, red flags. (j) References and source texts. The manual should be well-formatted with headings, tables, and clear explanations.

Create js/pdf-report.js implementing PDF report generation using html2pdf.js (loaded from CDN): (a) Compile all assessment results into a formatted report. (b) Include cover page with boy and girl details. (c) Include all sections: Bhava analysis, BPHS assessment, KP assessment, Marriage timeline, 20-year forecast summary, Health compatibility, Ashtakoota scores, Dashakoota scores. (d) Format tables and color coding for PDF output. (e) Add page breaks between major sections. (f) Include summary/conclusion section with overall compatibility verdict.

Wire up the PDF Report tab in app.js: Add a 'Generate PDF Report' button that triggers the pdf-report.js compilation and download. Show a preview of what will be exported. Include options for which sections to include in the report.
acceptance_criteria: Technical Manual tab displays comprehensive documentation of all methodologies used
PDF Report tab has a Generate button that produces a downloadable PDF
PDF contains all assessment sections with proper formatting
Technical Manual covers all 8 main topics (BPHS, KP, Dasha, Transit, Health, Ashtakoota, Dashakoota, interpretation)
PDF report includes cover page, all analysis sections, and summary
verification: Open Technical Manual tab and verify all methodology sections are present and readable
Enter birth details, then go to PDF Report tab and click Generate
Verify a PDF file is downloaded with all sections included
Check that PDF formatting is clean with proper page breaks
